name: InteractableCard
description: Interactive card container for button-like actions and selectable card groups.

accent.description: Accent border position on the card.

onChange.description: Callback fired when selection state changes for a card.

group.defaultValue.description: Initial selection value for uncontrolled `InteractableCardGroup` (array when `multiSelect` is true).

group.value.description: Controlled selection value for `InteractableCardGroup` (array when `multiSelect` is true).

group.disabled.description: Disables all cards in the group.

slots.children: Card content, typically headings, text, and optional icons.

accessibility.role: `button` for standalone card, `radio` or `checkbox` when used in InteractableCardGroup
keyboard: Standalone cards support Enter and Space activation
In single-select groups, Arrow keys move focus and selection
In multi-select groups, Enter does not toggle selection
aria: `aria-checked` is applied when card role is `radio` or `checkbox`
`aria-disabled` is set when card or group is disabled
Group role is `radiogroup` for single-select and `group` for multi-select
